name: gtm-brain
description: Interviews a business operator and produces a tiered, org-specific GTM-Brain spec: a Strategy Readout (operator-facing) over a Build Spec (technical-team-facing). A self-serve build kit — run a guided, resumable, multi-phase interview and walk out with a spec your team can stand up a credible v1 from. Play-first and tool-agnostic: it discovers the plays that matter to your org and captures your actual named tools; it ships no vendor connectors and never calls your tools.
